- The new integrated cross-sections, after detailed
balance conversion into the inverse reaction
3He(n,p)3H, resolve a discrepancy near the resonance
of the total n-He3 cross section.
- The essential point of this experiment was the quasi-
absoluteness of the measurements. during each part of
the experiment all experimental conditions were
maintained as constant as possible so that all data
measured in a period have the same scale.
